prompt: issue-129: CSV and PDF export
summary: Enhanced CSV export with full filter parity (category, q, paymentMethod, amount range). Added PDF export with pdfkit: transaction table + category summary. Shared buildExportFilter function. 26 tests passing.
Added CSV + PDF export endpoints with full filter support (#129). 26 tests. Uses pdfkit.

prompt: Issue #371: shareable certificate page
summary: OG image endpoint (1200x630, no personal data), certificate page stats+share section, /c/ short URL, autofillRate computed on completion

prompt: Issue #131: recurring expense auto-creation with scheduled job
summary: Rewrote processRecurringExpenses to use processedUntil for idempotent back-creation of missed expenses. Added nextDueDate/lastProcessedDate/processedUntil/active fields to RecurringExpense model. Added POST /api/recurring/process admin endpoint. Fixed month-end overflow bug in calculateNextOccurrence. 29 new tests, all 458 pass. PR #133.
Recurring expense auto-creation with idempotent processing + 29 tests (#131). Fixed date overflow bug.

prompt: issue-245-export-csv-pdf
summary: Added server-side CSV/PDF export buttons to transaction list. Export service functions call /api/export/csv and /api/export/pdf with active filters. Loading state and error handling via axios interceptor. PR #247.
Added CSV/PDF export buttons to transaction list with loading states (#245). Wired to backend /api/export endpoints.

prompt: #368 field mapping editor — review and fix autofill source assignments
summary: GET /api/forms/[id]/autofill/mapping + FieldMappingEditor modal with source dropdown, confidence badge, Accept All; Review Mapping button in FormViewer action bar and autofill summary banner

prompt: #367 autofill snapshot history — view and restore previous fill states
summary: FormSnapshot Prisma model, snapshot after each autofill (max 10/form), GET /snapshots + POST /restore endpoints, History button + panel modal in FormPageClient
Merged PR #39: Jest test suite with 28 tests (squat/deadlift/pushup analysis, sessionStorage, mathUtils). CI updated to run tests. Shared angleDeg extracted to mathUtils.ts (#31).
Added offline support: MMKV cache persistence, sync queue with failed/retry states, optimistic creates, offline banner with sync status (#351). 43 tests.
Progress tracking on History screen: stats header, personal bests cards with filter, score trend arrows. 12 new tests (#41). PR #45.
Added overhead press as 4th exercise with form analysis (back arch, uneven press, incomplete lockout), rep detection, camera guide. 5 tests (#44). PR #46.

prompt: Add personal data export (JSON) to Settings page
summary: Added GET /api/export/json backend endpoint returning full user data dump (expenses, recurring, templates, goals, budgets, preferences). Added Your Data section to Settings page with Download All Data button showing loading spinner. Frontend PR #250, Backend PR #136. Tests added.
Added full data export (JSON) — backend GET /api/export/json + frontend Settings download button (#249). Exports expenses, recurring, templates, goals, profile.
Rep-by-rep form breakdown on Summary: per-rep flag data, colored bars, best/worst badges, fatigue detection. 8 tests (#43). PR #47.

prompt: issue-134-auth-rate-limiting
summary: Added express-rate-limit to all auth endpoints: login 10/15min, register 5/1hr, social 20/15min. Returns 429 with JSON error and Retry-After header. Skips in test env unless ENABLE_RATE_LIMIT=true.
Added rate limiting on auth endpoints: login 10/15min, register 5/hr, social 20/15min (#134). Uses express-rate-limit.
Added PATCH /api/users/password endpoint with validation, social-auth guard, 9 tests (#135).
Rest timer + multi-set flow: RestTimer screen with circular countdown, Session shows set number, Summary shows per-set breakdown + duration (#42). PR #48.
In-app feedback form: category picker, message validation, expo-mail-composer, device info toggle. 10 tests (#50). PR #54.

prompt: Add change-password UI to Settings page (#248)
summary: Added Security section to Settings page with Change Password form. Three fields (current, new, confirm), client-side validation (min 6 chars, match), PATCH /api/users/password call, success toast, inline error handling. Hidden for social-auth users (Google/Apple). 7 new tests added. PR #251 opened.
Added change password UI to Settings with social-auth detection, inline form, 7 tests (#248).
Exercise form tips reference: ideal form, common mistakes with explanations, camera setup for all 4 exercises (#52). PR #55.
Error handling: shared ErrorState/LoadingState components, no-landmarks hint, zero-rep summary warning (#53). PR #56.

prompt: #372 form deadline reminders — due dates, email alerts, dashboard badges
summary: dueDate on Form + FormReminder cooldown table, daily cron sending reminder emails, date picker in form detail, due badges on dashboard cards, upcoming deadlines widget
Per-rep numeric scoring (0-100) with severity weights, sqrt diminishing returns. All 4 exercises updated. 9 new tests, 72 total (#51). PR #57.

prompt: Issue #139: Implement savings goals API
summary: Added Goal Mongoose model and CRUD routes at /api/goals with auth, validation, ownership checks. 17 integration tests. PR #140.
Added savings goals CRUD API — GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/goals with 17 tests (#139). Unblocks frontend+mobile goals pages.

prompt: issue #254 — spending forecast widget
summary: Added SpendingForecast dashboard widget: projects month-end spending from daily rate, per-category projections with color-coded budget comparison (on-track/near-limit/over-budget). Only shows for current month. 7 tests passing. PR #255.
Added SpendingForecast widget — projects month-end spend with per-category breakdowns, color-coded against budgets (#254). 7 tests.

Phase 7 planned: 4 features for beta retention — exercise customization (#59), weekly form report (#60), data export (#61), guided workout programs (#62). Programs blocked on customization. Focus is making testers stay and improve through structure and progress visibility.

prompt: Gate field mapping editor and other Pro features for free users (#373)
summary: Added upgradeGateFeature state to FormViewer, gated openMappingEditor for non-Pro users; FormPageClient gates snapshot history and due date changes

prompt: #253 Add receipt scan UI
summary: Added inline ReceiptScanButton inside AddExpenseModal next to NLP input. Passes onScanReceipt and scanLoading props from MainLayout. 5 new tests. PR #256.

prompt: Build billing and subscription management page (#374)
summary: Updated /api/billing to return subscription details, added /api/billing/invoices Stripe endpoint, rewrote billing page with next billing date, invoice history, plan comparison table, and success/canceled banners
Added inline receipt scan button to AddExpenseModal, 5 tests (#253).
CSV and JSON data export from Settings: share sheet, per-set CSV rows, 8 tests (#61). PR #63.

prompt: issue #252 budget management page
summary: Added Budget Management page (BudgetsPage.tsx) with full CRUD: create/edit/delete budgets, alert threshold toggle, progress bars with spend vs limit. Added getBudgetSummary and setBudgetAlerts API functions. Wired into MainLayout as tab 6 (Budgets) with sidebar and bottom nav. PR #257 to develop.
Added full Budget Management page — CRUD dialogs, progress bars, alert settings, responsive grid (#252).

prompt: Weekly email digest — deadline context, settings page, GET cron handler (#375)
summary: Added dueDate to digest email with overdue/due-soon labels, fixed GET handler for Vercel crons, created /api/settings PATCH endpoint, /dashboard/settings page with email toggles, Settings nav item
Per-exercise preferences: rest time, target sets/reps. AsyncStorage persistence, Settings UI, Session/RestTimer integration. 4 tests (#59). PR #64.
Weekly form report: session count, avg score, bar chart, top flag drill, PBs, week-over-week. 6 tests (#60). PR #65.

prompt: Add per-form private notes with auto-save (#376)
summary: Added notes String? to Form model, GET/PATCH API route, FormNotesPanel drawer with debounce auto-save, toolbar button with indicator, and hasNotes icon on dashboard cards
Guided workout programs: 3 starter programs, progression logic, Programs + ProgramDay screens. 5 tests (#62). PR #66.

prompt: Mobile-optimized form fill experience (#379)
summary: Default guided mode on mobile, View Original button + full-screen doc modal, sticky bottom action bar with safe-area-inset, bottom padding on content container

prompt: Field flag / mark-for-review system (#380)
summary: localStorage-persisted flag toggle on field rows, amber left-border accent, flagged count badge with filter, export pre-flight warning for blank flagged fields, auto-clear on accept

prompt: Common form quick-start library
summary: Added 12 pre-built form definitions (W-4, I-9, DS-160, Direct Deposit, Emergency Contact, Offer Letter, Rental App, Healthcare Intake, POA, Schedule A, I-765, General Job App), library index with dynamic imports, GET/POST API routes, /dashboard/library page with category filter, and dashboard entry points

prompt: Resume incomplete fills — persistent banner + stale session purge
summary: Enhanced resume banner to be persistent with field count and dismiss button; added onClearAll prop to FormViewer; added weekly cron to purge 90-day-old empty FILLING forms

prompt: Profile completeness score with category sub-scores and click-to-scroll
summary: Replaced flat checklist in ProfileForm with 4 category chips showing sub-scores; clicking incomplete chip expands section and scrolls to it; empty state prompt; tooltip on score label

prompt: Form history and re-fill — clone completed submission with values preserved
summary: Added POST /api/forms/[id]/refill endpoint, Re-fill button on COMPLETED form cards, and History section on dashboard (last 3 free, all Pro)
